name: Luna Reading Armchair
description: Soft upholstered armchair with a deep seat, lumbar pillow, and quiet profile for a reading corner or book nook.

name: Harbor Recliner Chair
description: Compact recliner with padded arms and an adjustable footrest for evening books, movies, and relaxed lounge seating.

name: Elm Side Table
description: Narrow side table for lamps, drinks, remotes, and a stack of books beside a sofa or chair.

name: AeroQuiet Over-Ear Headphones
description: Wireless over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation, long battery life, and soft pads for flights and focus work.

name: FocusPods Noise-Cancelling Earbuds
description: Tiny wireless earbuds that reduce cabin noise and office chatter while keeping calls clear during commutes.

name: HomeFlow Smart Hub
description: Central smart home hub that connects lights, plugs, sensors, and routines for automated mornings and evenings.

name: Lumina Smart Bulb Starter Pack
description: Four color smart bulbs for schedules, dimming, sunrise wakeups, and remote light control from an app.

name: SceneSwitch Wireless Dimmer
description: Battery powered wall control for triggering lighting scenes, movie mode, and bedtime routines without wiring.

name: BrewMate Thermal Coffee Maker
description: Programmable drip coffee maker with a stainless thermal carafe that keeps coffee hot without a warming plate.

name: ChefLine Induction Pan
description: Nonstick induction-ready frying pan with a balanced handle for eggs, vegetables, and weeknight meals.

name: PureSip Water Filter Pitcher
description: Large refrigerator pitcher that reduces chlorine taste and keeps filtered water ready for daily hydration.

name: DeskLift Standing Desk
description: Electric height-adjustable desk with memory presets for switching between sitting and standing during work.

name: ErgoMesh Office Chair
description: Breathable mesh task chair with adjustable arms, seat depth, and lumbar support for long desk sessions.

name: ClearView Monitor Arm
description: Gas spring monitor arm that lifts a display off the desk and improves ergonomic viewing height.

name: TrailLite Carry-On Spinner
description: Lightweight hard shell carry-on suitcase with smooth spinner wheels and organized interior dividers.

name: PackFlat Packing Cubes
description: Set of travel packing cubes that compress clothing and separate clean items from laundry.

name: Nomad Neck Pillow
description: Memory foam travel pillow that supports the neck during long flights, train rides, and road trips.

name: GlowDesk LED Task Lamp
description: Adjustable desk lamp with warm and cool modes for reading, video calls, and late night study.

name: Nordic Floor Lamp
description: Minimal floor lamp with a fabric shade that adds soft ambient light beside a sofa or armchair.

name: MotionGuard Porch Light
description: Outdoor wall light with motion sensing and dusk-to-dawn control for entryways and side doors.

name: FlexRun Treadmill
description: Folding treadmill for walking or running workouts at home with incline control and quick speed buttons.

name: CoreMat Exercise Mat
description: Thick non-slip mat for yoga, stretching, pilates, and floor strength sessions.

name: PulseBand Fitness Tracker
description: Slim activity tracker for steps, sleep, heart rate, workouts, and phone notifications.

name: AirBreeze Tower Fan
description: Quiet oscillating tower fan with remote control for bedrooms, offices, and summer living rooms.

name: PureAir Compact Purifier
description: Small HEPA air purifier that reduces dust, pollen, and pet dander in bedrooms or home offices.

name: WarmNest Weighted Blanket
description: Breathable weighted blanket for calmer rest, couch naps, and a steady tucked-in feeling.

name: StackRight Storage Bins
description: Clear lidded bins for closets, seasonal clothes, pantry overflow, and garage organization.

name: EntryWay Shoe Rack
description: Two-tier bamboo shoe rack that keeps sneakers, boots, and slippers organized near the door.

name: CableNest Organizer Box
description: Desk cable box that hides power strips, chargers, and tangled cords under a clean lid.

name: GardenPro Hose Reel
description: Wall mounted hose reel with a slow rewind system for tidy patios, lawns, and garden beds.

name: PatioFold Bistro Set
description: Folding outdoor table and two chairs for balconies, patios, and compact garden seating.

name: SunTrail Cooler Backpack
description: Insulated backpack cooler for picnics, beach days, hikes, and packed drinks.

name: PixelTab 11 Tablet
description: Lightweight tablet for streaming, note taking, web browsing, and casual games on the couch or plane.

name: ChargeDock 3-in-1
description: Wireless charging stand for phone, earbuds, and watch on a bedside table or desk.

name: SoundBar Mini
description: Compact TV soundbar that improves dialogue clarity and bass without a full home theater setup.

name: StreamCam Pro Webcam
description: 1080p webcam with autofocus and dual microphones for video meetings, remote classes, and streaming.

name: QuietType Mechanical Keyboard
description: Compact mechanical keyboard with dampened switches for focused typing in shared offices.

name: PageTurn E-Reader
description: Glare-free e-reader with warm light and weeks of battery life for novels, travel, and bedtime reading.

name: SleepWave White Noise Machine
description: Bedside sound machine with fan, rain, and ocean sounds to mask street noise and improve sleep routines.

name: BabyView Video Monitor
description: Secure video baby monitor with night vision, two-way talk, and room temperature alerts.

name: StrollLite Travel Stroller
description: Lightweight folding stroller that fits tight car trunks and airport trips with one-hand collapse.

name: PetFresh Auto Feeder
description: Programmable pet feeder that serves scheduled portions for cats and small dogs when owners are away.

name: PawRest Orthopedic Pet Bed
description: Supportive foam pet bed with washable cover for older dogs, crate naps, and living room comfort.

name: AquaSense Leak Sensor
description: Smart water leak sensor that alerts your phone when moisture appears under sinks, washers, or water heaters.

name: SecureCam Doorbell
description: Smart video doorbell with person detection, two-way talk, and package zone alerts for front doors.

name: MealPrep Glass Containers
description: Oven-safe glass food containers with locking lids for leftovers, lunches, and batch cooking.

name: QuickSteam Garment Steamer
description: Handheld steamer that removes wrinkles from shirts, dresses, and travel clothes without an ironing board.

name: CleanSweep Robot Vacuum
description: Robot vacuum with mapping, scheduled cleaning, and automatic recharge for hard floors and low pile rugs.

name: SafeBox Fireproof Document Case
description: Portable fire-resistant case for passports, insurance papers, backup drives, and important household records.

name: HomeReady Emergency Kit
description: Prepared emergency kit with first aid supplies, flashlight, radio, water pouches, and basic tools for outages.
